blocks.content: Grouping and timing are configured on notification policies. In this milestone you navigate to the Notification policies page where the full policy tree is displayed.
To navigate to Notification policies, complete the following steps:
In Grafana Cloud, navigate to **Alerts & IRM > Alerting > Notification policies** from the main menu.

You should see the notification policy tree with the default policy at the top.

In the next milestone, you'll edit the default policy's Group by setting.
